hero.title: Hi, I'm Alex
hero.description: I build frontend and full-stack products. This website contains my experience, selected projects, and contact details.

about.title: About
about.description: I focus on building modern and high-performance web products.
about.intro: Here you will find more information about me, what I do, and my current skills mostly in terms of programming and technology.
about.p1: I am a frontend focused web developer building and managing user interfaces for web products that solve real problems.
about.p2: I enjoy sharing what I learn about web development and helping the developer community grow together.
about.p3: I am open to job opportunities where I can contribute, learn, and create value. If you have a good opportunity, feel free to contact me.

contact.description: Feel free to reach out via email or social platforms.
